description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling windows, stone-textured balcony walls, and a rooftop terrace with a hot tub, umbrella, and potted plants. The house includes multiple outdoor living spaces, such as a spacious ground-level patio with lounge furniture and a second-story balcony. A carport with an orange car is integrated into the structure, and a glass-enclosed stairwell or elevator shaft is attached to one side. The color palette is primarily white and light stone, with black window frames and accents, giving the house a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and strong indoor-outdoor connections.
description: A modern, multi-level house with large windows, flat roof terraces, and integrated outdoor living spaces. The design features white and stone textures, black accents, and a carport with a glass stairwell.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, a balcony, rooftop terrace with hot tub, and attached glass stairwell.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport with an orange car, expansive windows, and rooftop terrace with umbrella and hot tub.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the carport, glass stairwell, and a clear look at the rooftop amenities and ground-level patio.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended balcony, rooftop terrace, and the glass stairwell structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with large glass doors, no visible steps, integrated into a covered patio, minimalistic and open design
